heading: United States marshals’ authority to designate keeper
label: 3009 United States marshals’ authority to designate keeper
text: Whenever a United States marshal is authorized to seize property pursuant to this chapter, the United States marshal may designate another person or Federal agency to hold for safekeeping such property seized.
notes: Effective DateSection effective 180 days after , and applicable with respect to certain actions for debts owed the United States pending in court on that effective date, see , set out as a note under .Nov. 29, 1990section 3631 of Pub. L. 101–647section 3001 of this title
